statement: After every code edit, call read/problems (or get_errors) to check for compile errors, lint warnings, and diagnostics before moving on. The agent mode compile-check-fix loop is the core design principle: generate code, check diagnostics, fix errors, repeat until clean. Never reason past compiler errors; the compiler parsed the actual source tree.
publicSummary: Always check diagnostics after every edit — the compile-check-fix loop is how agent mode self-corrects.
cautionNotes: In rare cases diagnostics may be stale (language server restart needed) or report false positives from cached state.
